brand.titleLong: {{BRAND_NAME}} — The Global Marketplace & Knowledge Hub for {{BREED}} Genetics
brand.description: Buy and sell {{BREED}} genetics — semen and embryos — and explore the breed's origin story, foundation bloodlines, a live genetics price index, and translated global news. The central hub for the world's {{BREED}} community. Free to list.

products.label: Semen
products.blurb: Conventional & sexed straws from proven {{BREED}} sires.

products.label: Embryos
products.blurb: Full-blood IVF & in-vivo embryos, sire × dam pedigrees.

copy.heroTitle: The world's marketplace & knowledge hub for {{BREED}} genetics
copy.heroSub: Buy and sell {{BREED}} semen and embryos — and explore the breed's origin story, foundation bloodlines, a live genetics price index, and translated global news. List in under a minute. Free.
copy.searchPlaceholder: Search a stud, sire, or bloodline…
copy.roundupIntro: The Roundup brings the whole {{BREED}} genetics market together: listings posted on {{BRAND_NAME}} plus semen and embryo listings we track from studs' public pages across the web (marked 📡 — those link straight back to the original seller's page; web sellers pay nothing and can remove a listing anytime).
copy.theaterIntro: The world's {{BREED}} video library — bulls on film, sale recordings, and how-to. Searchable by registration number.
copy.foundationIntro: Meet the animals behind the breed — the founding sires and dams every modern {{BREED}} traces back to.

substitutions: Japanese and Chinese reporting translated, found nowhere else
Global reporting translated into your language
